title: phyllanthus ramillosus
intro: Phyllanthus ramillosus, also known as the Philippine green gold or green gold of Mabini, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus ramillosus is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional remedies, such as teas, tonics, and ointments.
